landingSubtitle: The full component catalog is hosted separately from this project.
landingDescription: Use the button below to browse every component: live previews, props, states, and copy-pasteable code examples.
landingHint: The catalog opens in a new browser tab on the template publisher's site.
landingDevBannerDescription: This menu appears when you run make dev. Production builds (make build) never include it. Don't want it in dev either? Set VITE_SHOW_DEV_FEATURES=false in .env or .env.development.
